case_title: LUIS MONTANO VS. MASTRELLI'S DELICATESSEN, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTANO, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MASTRELLI'S DELICATESSEN, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTANO, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASTRELLI'S DELICATESSEN, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC $5,488.66 PRINCIPAL, $25.17 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,670.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
